text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Phew... We're finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Riko Kashimoto and I decide to visit a<n>hot spring
in order to take a break<n>from work and wash
away some of<n>our exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I did some research about the health<n>benefits of
the waters here, and<n>apparently they're rather
excellent.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This might be a good location to use<n>for a team
training camp.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know this was supposed to be a<n>day trip, but
let's stay the night if they<n>have any rooms
available.
choice_data_list: Oh, you want to extend our trip?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The best way to check the<n>quality and taste
of their meals is to<n>try them ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What a relief that we managed to get<n>a room.
Both the food and hot spring<n>were excellent.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I can't remember the last time I had a<n>chance to
relax like this...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Though, to be frank, I never would've<n>imagined
going on a trip like this with<n>you.
choice_data_list: We sure make an odd pair, huh?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Our ways of thinking are so different,<n>from our
approach to training, to... well,<n>everything else.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Yet despite our differences... or rather because of our differences,we're able to learn a lot from eachother.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'm always watching how you do<n>things.
Remember that and keep up<n>the good work, hm?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Now then, I'd like to hear<n>what your
plans are for—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt, bzzzt, bzzzt.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I'm getting a call.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse? What's the matter?<n>...Yes, I'll deal
with that tomorrow<n>afternoon, as planned.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What? Where am I right now? Well,<n>um...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I want to make it perfectly clear<n>that we are
merely on a business trip<n>as fellow trainers—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Listen, stop making this out to be<n>some
sleepover party or—hello? Bitter<n>Glasse? Hello?!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
We're returning to the academy first<n>thing
tomorrow morning. Please be<n>ready to depart as
quickly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, we leave the inn before<n>the sun
rises... I've never seen her<n>move so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame there weren't any<n>rooms available.
I suppose that's to<n>be expected on such short
notice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
At least we could enjoy the hot<n>spring. It was
spacious, well laid out,<n>and the floors were
nonslip.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I feel more confident and comfortable<n>with
bringing my charges here now.
choice_data_list: You really care for your racers.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But of course. You're the same way<n>yourself,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'll use any means and do everything<n>in my
power to protect those two.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
And though I don't intend to<n>compromise on my
approach, that<n>doesn't mean I'll never<n>
accommodate change.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'm no more immune to change than<n>anyone,
just like how Bitter Glasse<n>and Little Cocon
grow every passing<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I can't forge a path to the future for<n>them unless
I expand my knowledge<n>and improve myself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: My methods aren't understood bymany, but I will create a cleartrack for my runners to follow.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...That's what I believe the role of a<n>trainer is.
choice_data_list: Let's both work hard for our students' sake.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Bold words for one who knows my<n>standards of
"hard work."

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But to be a trainer at Tracen<n>Academy, that's the
sort of<n>confidence you need.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I look forward to what the<n>future holds
for you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Now then, let's head back.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I need to put together a training camp<n>plan for my
racers.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We both think about our students as<n>we hurry
back to the academy.
